description_long: This sculpture depicts a recumbent human figure, likely a historical or religious figure, lying on its back with hands folded over the chest. The figure is dressed in long, flowing robes with detailed folds and appears to be resting on a rectangular base that serves as a pillow for the head. The facial features are finely carved, with a serene expression and closed eyes, suggesting a state of rest or repose. The surface of the sculpture shows signs of age, with a patina and some discoloration, indicating it may be made of painted or stained wood. The overall form is elongated, with the body and robes extending the full length of the base. The craftsmanship highlights careful attention to anatomical proportions and drapery details.
description: A detailed, elongated sculpture of a recumbent human figure in robes, hands folded on the chest, resting on a rectangular base with a pillow under the head.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the figure's body, with hands folded and the face looking upward, robes cascading down the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the profile of the face, the pillow under the head, and the length of the robes extending to the feet.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the back of the head and the pillow, with the robes' folds visible along the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the face, pillow, and the draped robes along the length of the body.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.
